keyPoints: Three-arm field design: constraint-based prompts, diversity-promoting prompts, unconstrained control.
Cross-cultural and multi-domain participant recruitment to test generalizability.
Longitudinal evaluation over 8–12 weeks with 2–4 week post-intervention follow-up.
Multi-metric outcomes: stylistic diversity (lexical, syntactic, embedding-based) and content diversity.
Long-run taste calibration assessed by expert blind raters across waves; assess stability and alignment.
Fidelity, cultural equivalence, and ethics governance embedded; document deviations and plan for governance.
Pre-register hypotheses and analysis plan; detailed prompt configurations, model versions, evaluation rubrics for reproducibility.
